raw_consumer_statement: My Citi bank card had some fraudulent charges on it from XX/XX/2023 to XX/XX/2023 charges XXXX charges ranging from XXXX to XXXX to a vendor ( XXXX XXXX ). However, the company is telling me that the chip was present at the time of purchase, so they do not feel that it is a fraud claim. The vendor is listed as from XXXX XXXX CA. a place I have never been. Four of the five claims have been denied, however the fifth was covered because it had happened after I reported the charges and was issued a new card. it was charged from the same vendor oddly enough, so they canceled my new card and sent me a third. I have Called several times to have this issue resolved and am frankly sick of the run around. anyone with access to my account and common sense can see there is a clear problem however Citi has made me feel powerless to resolve on my own or within their claims center.
